message: 🌱 Add external-secrets: (Vault Provider) - Getting multiple secrets does not work mission (#661)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "external-secrets-3116-vault-provider-getting-multiple-secrets-does-not-work-if-k",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "external-secrets: (Vault Provider) - Getting multiple secrets does not work if KV store name contains `data` keyword",
+    "description": "(Vault Provider) - Getting multiple secrets does not work if KV store name contains `data` keyword. This issue affects 20+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify external-secrets troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your external-secrets deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review external-secrets configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant external-secrets configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl get configmap -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=external-secrets\n```\nHello, \n\nFirst of all thank you for creating this project and maintaining it\n\nI'm not able to get multiple secrets from a Vault KV V2 store if the KV name contains `data` keyword (for example: `mykv_data`)\n\n**To Reproduce**\n\nSteps to reproduce the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for (Vault Provider) - Getting multiple secrets does not work",
+        "description": "## Problem Statement\n\nWhat is the problem you're trying to solve?\r\nHow do you like to solve the issue and why?\n```yaml\napiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1beta1\nkind: ClusterSecretStore\nmetadata:\n  name: myClusterSecretStore\nspec:\n  provider:\n    vault:\n      auth:\n        ...\n      server: https://myvault_fqdn\n      version: v2\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm (Vault Provider) - Getting multiple secrets does is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n external-secrets --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Problem Statement\n\nWhat is the problem you're trying to solve?\r\nHow do you like to solve the issue and why?",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1beta1\nkind: ClusterSecretStore\nmetadata:\n  name: myClusterSecretStore\nspec:\n  provider:\n    vault:\n      auth:\n        ...\n      server: https://myvault_fqdn\n      version: v2",
+        "apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1beta1\nkind: ExternalSecret\nmetadata:\n  name: list-secrets\nspec:\n  dataFrom:\n  - find:\n      path: mykv_data/data/path/to/my/secrets\n      name:\n        regexp: \".*\"\n  refreshInterval: 1m\n  secretStoreRef:\n    kind: ClusterSecretStore\n    name: myClusterSecretStore\n  target:\n    name: list-secrets",
+        "* 1 error occurred:\n           * permission denied\n  Warning  UpdateFailed         2m (x5 over 2m)      external-secrets  cannot read secret data from Vault: Error making API request.\n\nURL: GET https://myvault_fqdn/v1/mykv_metadata/data/path/to/my/secrets?list=true\nCode: 403. Errors:\n\n* 1 error occurred:\n  * permission denied"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "external-secrets",
+      "sandbox",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/3116",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/pull/3852"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 6,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with external-secrets installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:32:22.158Z",
